Allergy Blood Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an Allergy Blood Test? 
An allergy blood test measures the amount of allergy-causing antibodies called immunoglobulin E (IgE). Antibodies are proteins that your immune system makes to fight foreign substances, such as viruses and bacteria . Â But your immune system may also make them in response to allergens.
